sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ صَدِيقِي أَنْ يَفْتَتِحَ مَشْرُوعَهُ الْخَاصَّ فِي مَجَالِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا.
sentences.translation: Moj prijatelj je odlučio otvoriti vlastiti projekat u oblasti tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: My friend decided to open his own project in the field of technology.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِتَطْوِيرِ تَطْبِيقٍ جَدِيدٍ يُسَاعِدُ النَّاسَ فِي حَيَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: On naporno radi na razvoju nove aplikacije koja pomaže ljudima u njihovim životima.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard to develop a new application that helps people in their lives.

sentences.arabic: النَّجَاحُ يَتَطَلَّبُ الصَّبْرَ وَالتَّخْطِيطَ الْجَيِّدَ لِلْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh zahtijeva strpljenje i dobro planiranje za budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: Success requires patience and good planning for the future.
